name: Samantha Gross, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: the strength of our movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|

> [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91adb/70cdc2ba/47278ed3/39750a0/129331417/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em092916_3&source=em092916_3")
Friend, we have come a long way since we first asked you to join this grassroots movement.

A lot has happened since then and we are very proud of the strong support you and so many others have poured into this campaign.

Now we are coming up on the biggest quarterly FEC report of this election. There are just over 24 hours until Friday's midnight deadline.

You know what that means .... **[We need your help to show our opponent, her SuperPAC, and outside groups that we have what it takes to win.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91adb/70cdc2ba/47278ed3/39750a1/129331417/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092916_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+need+your+help+to+show+our+opponent+h&utm_campaign=em092916_3&source=em092916_3")**

name: NH Senate Update
subject: Lost the lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93a/2a380d31/16c2e966/fd1465/3238285834/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93a/2a380d31/16c2e966/fd1465/3238285834/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
The biggest FEC deadline of our campaign is TOMORROW, and we've lost our lead in New Hampshire's race that will almost certainly decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court.
Corporate special interests, like groups tied to Mitch McConnell, Karl Rove, and the Koch Brothers, have spent $40 million on misleading ads against Governor Hassan -- and it's working. **THREE recent polls show Maggie trailing Trump-endorsed Kelly Ayotte.**
The best -- and maybe only -- way to get back on track to win in New Hampshire and take back the Senate is to hit our critical $100,000 goal before tomorrow's FEC deadline. This is the most important deadline of this campaign, but right now we're at risk of falling very short, friends:
**[Please give $3 or more now so that together, we can hit our goal before midnight tomorrow. Every dollar you give will help elect Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93a/2a380d31/16c2e966/fd1466/3238285834/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5XzA5MjhwbU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_0928pmNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93a/2a380d31/16c2e966/fd1466/3238285834/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5XzA5MjhwbU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_0928pmNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

Help us get back on track to win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93a/2a380d31/16c2e966/fd1466/3238285834/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5XzA5MjhwbU5PX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_0928pmNO_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

Maggie for NH

name: John Lewis
subject: fighting for what's right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dea/738133e4/3175ca80/7f8545dc/325682376/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160929jl?refcode=pme160929jl_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Friend,

I've been fighting for civil rights for more than 50 years.

We've made incredible progress since then, but it is not enough.

Donald Trump, Marco Rubio, and their supporters in the Republican Party would eliminate much of that progress -- the hateful rhetoric they have used this election cycle makes that very clear.

We cannot allow that to happen. We have to put Democrats back in charge of the Senate. Florida is crucial to that effort, and the Senate race couldn't be closer. That's why I need you to join me and stand with Patrick now.

**[Chip in $5 now to help Patrick Murphy become Florida's next Senator>>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dea/738133e4/3175ca80/7f8545dc/325682376/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160929jl?refcode=pme160929jl_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")**

We shouldn't be fighting the same battles today that we were fighting in 1963. We need to move our country forward, not backwards. We need progressive leaders who will stand up for what's right, **and Patrick Murphy is one of those leaders.**

Patrick's fighting hard to protect and expand voting rights for all Americans. He knows we need to address the epidemic of gun violence in this country by passing common-sense gun safety measures. **He should be Florida 's next Senator.**

But Patrick is facing vicious Republican attacks. And now, he has a crucial fundraising deadline coming up on Friday. It's the last quarterly FEC deadline of this cycle.

[**Friend, I 'm asking you personally to help out. Let's replace Marco Rubio with a strong Democrat. Can you chip in for Patrick?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dea/738133e4/3175ca80/7f8545dd/325682376/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160929jl?refcode=pme160929jl_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Sincerely,
Congressman John Lewis

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dea/738133e4/3175ca80/7f8545de/325682376/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2dea/738133e4/3175ca80/7f8545df/325682376/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: urgent@dscc.org
subject: [right now] QUADRUPLE your impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We're behind on our end-of-month projections, and unless we rebound RIGHT NOW, Election Day won't be good for Democrats. The TRIPLE-MATCH is still in effect...
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
_**HURRY! ALL GIFTS QUADRUPLED UNTIL FEC DEADLINE!**_
[**It 's never meant more to our candidates! Pitch in today >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-MustSeeDS-V1S1&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&amounts=200,150,75,50,25&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/r2tm-dscc?refcode=DPE-20160920-JustAnnounced_DS-2016HD&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=500,250,200,150,100&amount=50")**
We're running out of options here, Friend:
➜**President Obama** reached out...
➜ **Michelle Obama** reached out...
➜ **James Carville** reached out...
➜ **Carole King** reached out...
➜ AND we even announced a [**TRIPLE-MATCH on grassroots gifts ...**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5") But after all that, **we 're STILL $389,792 behind of our end-of-month projections!** And if we continue to fall short, we won't be able to stay competitive in key states.

There's no need to exaggerate: Unless we rebound RIGHT NOW, Election Day could be a nightmare for Democrats everywhere. [**Will you rush a contribution to keep us rolling toward victory?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Urgent_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

**Our candidates need you to act. Without your immediate support, we can 't:**
* ELECT progressive fighters like **Tammy Duckworth** and **Katie McGinty**
* DEFEAT opponents of Planned Parenthood like **Richard Burr** and **Joe Heck**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant?=
subject: they won't outwork us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant
body:
|
---
| | Friend

Tomorrow is our last major end-of-month fundraising deadline of this campaign. How much we raise before tomorrow will determine our plan for the rest of this election.

The Inslee team is raking in millions in contributions from the state Democratic Party, whose platform includes _**a statewide income tax**_.

They will outspend us, but they won’t outwork us. They’re defending an incumbent with a record of mismanagement. Bill made that case at the debate and he won.

Since Bill’s victory Monday, people are paying attention now more than ever. It’s time to get our message back up on TV.

[**Can you help us out by contributing $35, $100, or even $500 towards getting our message out to voters across Washington?**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=4fe18e1903&e=32f1a3df98)

Our polling shows our TV ads move voters by more than 18 points – that’s more than Bill needs to win. It’s exactly what Dino Rossi said yesterday; “Bill can win as long as Republicans give him the money he needs to get his message out to voters.” Please help us do that by contributing today.

Justin Matheson
Campaign Manager
Bill Bryant for Governor
(253)220-5051

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I have a confession, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
We're lagging behind | | Derek, I have a confession:

After Hillary’s debate Monday night, I thought our online fundraising would absolutely skyrocket. I thought, once people see Hillary side-by-side debating _Donald Trump_ , they’ll see just how high the stakes of this election are, and they’ll do everything they can to make sure that we win this.

We had a good night, for sure. It was our best online fundraising night of the whole campaign, in fact. But our fundraising is still lagging behind what Trump is raising this week.

And now, with less than 36 hours until our final quarterly fundraising deadline of this campaign, I’m afraid we might be in real trouble, because we’re still pretty far from our goal of reaching 2.5 million grassroots donors. **Can you help us? When you donate for the first time, we’ll send you a free sticker.**
| **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
**[**Derek, donate now: $5**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $10**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $25**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
I've been sending emails to this team for a long time at this point, and I’ve never been anything less than honest with you. When we hit our goals, I thank you from the bottom of my heart, and we celebrate together. When we miss our goals, I let you know and ask you if you can do just a little more for this campaign.

The truth is that we’re not even close to where we need to be this month. I hate having to write to you to say that. I wish I felt confident that we have the resources we need to beat Donald Trump. But I don’t -- and if we lose, all the wishing in the world won't bring us back to this moment when we could have done something about it.

**[But we can do something right now -- and I’m really hoping you will.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Because here’s what else I know: This team is amazing. You give what you can and knock on doors and make phone calls and talk to your friends and neighbors about why you’re with Hillary and why we all have to get out there and vote for her this November. You write us the most beautiful letters sharing your stories of why this election matters to you and the people you love. You send us drawings your kids made of themselves standing with Hillary, and we hang them up on our conference room walls at campaign headquarters to remind us that we’re fighting for you just as surely as you’re fighting for us (we really do).

You are the team I would choose over any other to get through the final leg of this race. Hillary is counting on you, and so is this country. And I know you’re equal to the challenge.

**We’ve got fewer than 36 hours to hit our September goal, and 40 days until we find out who our next president will be. If you’re with Hillary, step up today and show her you have her back. If you don’t, Derek, who will?**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for everything. I know we can do this together.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**
| [

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185 [Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY2NTgzMjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTc4NzI0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Friend -- We're just 24 hours from the final FEC deadline of this race. **And thanks to Donald Trump 's humiliating debate, Democrats have ALL the momentum.**

**But here 's the thing:** Even though Michelle Obama, Al Franken, Carole King, and President Obama himself reached out, **we 've still got $371,498 standing between us and our end-of-quarter goal!**

[**Only a rapid surge can stop the Party of Trump from stealing this election out from under us! Will you pitch in before the TRIPLE-MATCH expires, Friend?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-24_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Your support won't just frustrate GOP billionaires like the Kochs (as cathartic as that is). It'll give Democrats the resources to:

* ACTIVATE an unprecedented, coast-to-coast voter turnout program
* OVERPOWER right-wing attacks on bold Democratic candidates
* FLIP Republicans seats in places like Missouri, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania -- and TAKE BACK THE SENATE!

name: Bill Bryant
subject: ICYMI: It’s not all rainbows and unicorns in Governor’s Office — despite voters’ moods
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant
body:
[Update Profile / Unsubscribe](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/private/igrfw8d7se/2I6/FP87cHS/unsubscribe/27582419)

---
| |
---
| | ****
---
| Friend In case you missed it, the Seattle Times highlighted the race for governor and just some of Jay Inslee's failures. Read two excerpts below: __ **_It’s not all rainbows and unicorns in Governor’s Office — despite voters’ moods_** _"In Monday’s debate, Bryant stuck with his strategy of hammering on Inslee’s Achilles’ heel — the management snafus that have popped up with regularity under the Inslee administration._ _Inslee has never been viewed as a great executive. Pollster Stuart Elway found just 37 percent of voters rate Inslee as “good or excellent” at managing state government._ _In the past year, we’ve learned what that looks like. We learned three people were killed when 2,800 inmates were let out of prison early by a long-known software-programming error. A botched rollout of toll lanes on Interstate 405. A federal judge issued huge fines because a dysfunctional Western State Hospital could not admit mentally ill patients being held in jail — and the hospital managed to lose 25,000 master keys and let two dangerous patients escape..."

_ Jay Inslee's incompetence and mismanagement are jeopardizing the safety of our communities. **[Will you contribute $35, $90, or $250 to help us reach voters](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/359/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.billbryantforgovernor.com%2Fsupport)** before Jay Inslee can blame and cover up his way back into the governor’s office? _"But Inslee is vulnerable on the Western State Hospital debacle, and Bryant has sharpened his attack. The psychiatric hospital failed four federal audits so badly that the federal Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services has essentially taken over. A federal judge said Inslee’s human-services staff “failed to show the leadership and capacity for innovation” in fixing the mess. And Inslee vetoed a key part of the Legislature’s bipartisan solution for Western State Hospital._ _Even in the context of a decades-long breakdown in the mental-health system, this is really bad._ _And it actually keeps getting worse. Inslee administration officials quietly gave up Western State Hospital’s independent accreditation — essentially a gold stamp of quality — as a hospital. A health-care recruiter told me it can be harder to recruit staff to a non-accredited hospital, and that’s Western State’s biggest challenge right now._
_Accreditation status is the kind of thing staff and legislators would like to know. But Inslee’s staff kept the decision quiet for three months until the media uncovered it._ _When Bryant tries to land punches, Inslee blames the mess on funding. Nevermind that the Legislature gave Inslee what he requested for the current $2.2 billion biennial mental-health budget. He’s working with the amount he wanted._ ___Nevermind, because political consequences for management failures seem to slide right off Sunny Jay..."_ Read the full column [here](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/361/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.seattletimes.com%2Fopinion%2Fits-not-all-rainbows-and-unicorns%2F).
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/363/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.billbryantforgovernor.com%2Fsupport)

| | | | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/365/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA)
---
| | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/367/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington)
---
| | [](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/369/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.billbryantforgovernor.com)
---
|
---

PO Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401[
](http://emarketing.voter-science.com/c/27582419/371/FP87cHS/igrfw8d7se?redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.billbryantforgovernor.com%2Funsubscribe%2520)

name: Paul
subject: Has it really been 11 months?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, When I became Speaker 11 months ago, I answered the call because my country needed me. Now our country needs you. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37874206:W8nvAzbqN:m:3:1155937413:78F724492813797928E5C73A4172AABC:r The final FEC End-of-Quarter deadline before the election is tonight. If we don't act now, we will bear the burden of responsibility for what happens to our country if Nancy Pelosi becomes Speaker. Every single conservative in America needs to answer the call before midnight tonight. Peter, I didn't back down when my country needed me -- and I know you won't back down now when our country needs you. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37874207:W8nvAzbqN:m:3:1155937413:78F724492813797928E5C73A4172AABC:r If we don't act now, come November 9th, we could look back to this FEC deadline as the day we lost the House, the Senate, and the Presidency. Ryan -Begin Forwarded Message- From: Paul Ryan Date: October 29, 2015 Subject: My vision Fellow Conservative -- This is a pivotal time in our nation's history. Americans firmly believe our country is headed down the wrong path, and we no longer see the promise for future generations that we once did. It's our responsibility in Congress to change that. That's why when I agreed to become the next Speaker, I did it for the sole purpose of unifying our great nation and helping preserve it for our children. Republicans in Congress can provide a vision to lead us towards a brighter tomorrow -- but we need your help. While House Republicans are hard at work trying to fix the many problems that plague our nation, we also need the grassroots support to maintain and grow our majority. Will you chip in $20 right now to support and help grow our majority? http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37874213:W8nvAzbqN:m:3:1155937413:78F724492813797928E5C73A4172AABC:r Hillary Clinton and Nancy Pelosi have their eyes set on retaking the House and the Senate. If they're able to do that, then our great nation will continue down the path of divisive politics and out-of-control spending. We can't allow that to happen. Will you stand by our side and help us restore the America you and I remember? http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37874214:W8nvAzbqN:m:3:1155937413:78F724492813797928E5C73A4172AABC:r Thank you for your support. God Bless, Speaker Paul D. Ryan P.S. This Saturday marks a crucial FEC fundraising deadline. Will you chip in $20 to help us reach our goal? name: =?UTF-8?Q?Kellyanne=20Conway?=
subject: Double Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We must make use of every single hour and every single dollar to defeat Hillary Clinton at the polls. |

Friend, Forwarding Mr. Trump’s message is the easiest way for me to show you how important this is. We’ve got an incredible opportunity here -- as you can see, Mr. Trump is very excited about beating our September fundraising goal with 1 day left to go -- and now he wants us to double it. Momentum is clearly on our side -- just look at the national polls. Even taking liberal media oversampling of Democrats and independents into account, Donald Trump is building his lead -- nationally and in key battleground states: In the L.A. Times daily tracking poll, Donald Trump scored a record high, leading Hillary Clinton 47.8% to 41.1% -- a lead of 6.7 points. Rasmussen has Mr. Trump leading by 5 percentage points nationally, and even Reuters has him leading by two points. In North Carolina, Fox News has Mr. Trump leading by 5, Monmouth has him up 8 in Iowa, while CNN has him leading by 5 points in Ohio and 4 in Florida. So you can see that we’re getting through to the voters in spite of the massive advantages the Clinton campaign has in cash and media support. And Mr. Trump understands that, so he’s challenging us to do even more. Doubling our September fundraising goal means a bigger field program in all of the key battleground states, more ads focusing on how Mr. Trump will Make America Great Again, and greater resources for our critical Get-Out-the-Vote operation. Friend, help us keep our momentum rolling and make history by setting a new record -- make a contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or more right now. Election Day is just weeks away -- we are breaking through to new Team Trump supporters every day, but early and absentee voting are already underway and we still have so much to do. We must make use of every single hour and every single dollar to defeat Hillary Clinton at the polls -- will you accept Donald Trump’s challenge to double our September fundraising today? Sincerely, Kellyanne Conway P.S. -- Friend, Mr. Trump is counting on us to strike a huge blow against the Clinton Political Machine so close to Election Day -- make a September “Double Time” donation now. Thanks, Kellyanne CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Mike Pence
subject: Indiana is in good hands with Eric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
When I began my work to bring Hoosier values to the White House, I knew I was leaving Indiana in good hands with Eric Holcomb as your next Governor. | | | | | [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/8be8cb8e599044229809bda827c09052?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=16108b0e0a8342cca795aa788ee4f63c&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=Image_Header_Logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160930-indiana-is-in-good-hands-with-eric-16266-direct)
---
| | | | Friend, When I began my work to bring Hoosier values to the White House, I knew I was leaving Indiana in good hands with Eric Holcomb as your next Governor. Eric Holcomb is a proven consensus builder with a strong track record of getting commonsense, conservative results that move Indiana forward. Eric can turn ideas into solutions, and solutions into progress. As a veteran of the United States Navy and as a trusted advisor not only to me, but to Governor Daniels and Senator Coats, Eric has always answered the call. _**Now he needs you to answer that same call.**_ **Will you step up for my good friend Eric and help him become the next Governor?[Contribute to Team Holcomb today.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/ba205b6f0645409c93c8f11f3e0ea07c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=16108b0e0a8342cca795aa788ee4f63c&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160930-indiana-is-in-good-hands-with-eric-16266-direct)** **At midnight tonight, they have to close the books on their 3rd quarter fundraising - and they're still short of their $50,000 goal.** I am honored to serve as Indiana's Governor and I know that Eric will keep us on the path forward with principled, conservative solutions that help Indiana grow and prosper. **[Contribute any amount up to $2,700 and help them beat this goal and win in November.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/03bd5bf9dd3a4e6cba8db767d2303e0b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=16108b0e0a8342cca795aa788ee4f63c&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160930-indiana-is-in-good-hands-with-eric-16266-direct)** Thank you,Mike Pence
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I will be writing a $2 million check for our quarterly deadline before the election.|

Real quick, Friend – Just wanted to make sure you got this email from Newt Gingrich (see below). Newt is going to send me the list of all the patriotic Americans who donate to this $2 million match challenge today. I hope to see your name on the list, Friend. Donate to our campaign and I will match your gift, dollar-for- dollar, up to $2 million. Just a few weeks to go – let’s beat Hillary Clinton and Make America Great Again! Donald Trump -- -- -- -- -- Forwarded message -- -- -- -- -- From: Newt Gingrich Date: Thu, Sep 29, 2016 at 9:04 AM Subject: Trump is asking for names of donors to match To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend, As you’ve heard, Donald Trump is going to write a matching check worth up to $2 million for our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election. And he’s tasked me with giving him the list of supporters whose contributions he gets the honor of matching. He’ll also know who stepped up to push us over our end-of-quarter goal. You still have time to get your name on the list to have your contribution personally MATCHED by Donald Trump. The deadline is September 30 at 11:59 PM. Contribute any amount you can spare and I will add your name to the list I hand Donald Trump of donations he will MATCH. CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> $200 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE $65 >>> $130 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> $50 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE $15 >>> $30 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Donald Trump is writing this unprecedented matching check to get your attention, Friend. This is the FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election. This is the time to make massive investments in programs that will decide the fate of this election. By this time next month, it will be too late. The media, Hillary’s research team, the DNC -- everyone who wrote off this movement since day one -- will be waiting to see the success of our final quarterly fundraising report. They’ll want to know if we have what it takes to compete with her Money Machine during the final stretch. I know that we can do it. But we’re going to need every single one of our supporters to step up and make a contribution. This is our opportunity to once again defy all odds and prove the mainstream media and liberal elites wrong. Now contribute before our FINAL FEC end-of-quarter deadline and I will put you on the list of donations Donald Trump gets the honor of MATCHING. Your friend,
Newt Gingrich CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> $200 THANKS TO TRUMP

name: My Faith Votes
subject: LIVE Event: An Honest Discussion About A Difficult Election
body:
An Honest Discussion About A Difficult Election
| [View this email in your browser.](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vsEBABzbVN)
---|---
---
| | **My Faith Votes**
presents
[An Honest Discussion About A Difficult Election](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37878638:sEBABzbVN:m:1:876315805:DF79D0A173F72E4FC0EA3ACA6612090F:r)
**Date:** OCT 4TH
**Time:** 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT)
My Faith Votes, The Florida Family Policy Council and LifeBridge Church (formerly Harvest Bible), are thrilled to announce another exciting _My Faith Votes LIVE Event_ on Tuesday, October 4th entitled "**_An Honest Discussion About A Difficult Election_**."

This event will broadcast [LIVE](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37878639:sEBABzbVN:m:1:876315805:DF79D0A173F72E4FC0EA3ACA6612090F:r) from suburban Orlando, FL at LifeBridge Church **FREE** of charge. The discussion will focus on how Jesus followers are to choose to vote even when the choices aren't clear. The live broadcast will begin at approximately 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT) and can be viewed on [My Faith Votes' website](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37878639:sEBABzbVN:m:1:876315805:DF79D0A173F72E4FC0EA3ACA6612090F:r).

Confirmed speakers include **Bob Vander Plaats** (President and CEO of Iowa's The Family Leader), **Bishop Harry Jackson** (The Reconciled Church, HILC), **Bill Wichterman** ** **(Former White House Liaison to the Faith Community under President George W. Bush), **Pastor Clayton Cloer** (First Baptist Church of Central Florida), and **John Stemberger** (President and General Counsel of the Florida Family Policy Council). Additional speakers will be announced soon.

If you plan to attend in person, be sure to [register for the community forum](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37878640:sEBABzbVN:m:1:876315805:DF79D0A173F72E4FC0EA3ACA6612090F:r). For LIVE viewers, [visit My Faith Votes and add a calendar reminder](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37878639:sEBABzbVN:m:1:876315805:DF79D0A173F72E4FC0EA3ACA6612090F:r) so you don't miss this event that is sure to be impactful.

My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the Church in America. **My Faith Votes**
presents
[An Honest Discussion About A Difficult Election](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37878638:sEBABzbVN:m:1:876315805:DF79D0A173F72E4FC0EA3ACA6612090F:r)
**Date:** OCT 4TH
**Time:** 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT)

---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://email.bencarson.com/p/isEBABzbVN). [Update your preferences](http://email.bencarson.com/p/osEBABzbVN)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.bencarson.com/p/osEBABzbVN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-38007830314-echo3-C63D3D396AB8827B93D72AB14100A37B@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

subject: Please, we’re worried
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)
---
**** Midnight FEC Deadline: STILL SHORT **
[DONATE NOW >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)** Honestly, we're worried.

The last six polls showed our race is within the margin of error, the Koch brothers and Mitch McConnell are continuing to pour in millions... _and we 're still short of our end-of-quarter goal._

We need to raise another $12,452 in the next 12 hours if we're going to be able to fight back against the other side's dark money and take on the Toomey money machine.

Toomey is counting on his special interests to have his back -- **but we 're counting on supporters like you.** [**Please, pitch in $5 now to help us reach our goal >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)
---
Pennsylvania can't risk another six years of Toomey and his ruinous agenda. We can't risk a McConnell-controlled Senate that stymies progress on every issue we care about. And we definitely can't risk a Republican-allied Supreme Court.

It's up to us to stop them -- together. [**Please help us meet our end-of-quarter goal by midnight tonight >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)

We're counting on you,

Team Katie
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1982950387262423040/8260471430295060480?refcode=e20160930.2&refcode2=e20160930.2nd&amount=25)**
---

| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: DEADLINE: Midnight tonight – don’t wait!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I'm matching all donations, up to $2 MILLION, but the FEC quarterly deadline is at midnight tonight. |
[](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2Mjc0LWYwNGJhNTllMDJkZDQ5MDE4MjFhMzM1NzVlNzkxNzIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuZG9uYWxkanRydW1wLmNvbS9maW5hbC1mZWMtZGVhZGxpbmUvP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPUpGQ19kaXJlY3QtYXNrX3NlcHQtZW9xJmFkZGl0aW9uYWxbdXRtX2NvbnRlbnRdPUNDLUxZLTA5MzAxNi1zZXB0LWVvcS1sYXN0LWNoYW5jZS1kanQtdHBnLWpmYy1wcyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXBfQ0NfTFk&K=P0sNDgnCccPjp3DC9E3ZQw)

Friend,

This is it. Are you with me?

**Midnight TONIGHT is the final quarterly Federal Election Commission deadline of this historic campaign.** With our country's future on the line, I made a HUGE commitment this week to keep up our amazing momentum and roll into October strong.

body:
_This is our Link of the Week email -- the things that we're sharing around the office, and we think everyone on Team Maggie should know about. We hope you'll enjoy clicking around as much as we do._
_FiveThirtyEight'_ s Nate Silver recently tweeted a pretty shocking statistic about our race:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd938/2a380d31/16c6f266/fd144b/2606388043/VEsH/ "https://twitter.com/NateSilver538/status/778273212253794304?lang=en")
This is huge. No wonder Kelly Ayotte's corporate special interest backers have dropped $40 MILLION and counting to stop Governor Hassan from winning: **each and every vote in this race has sixteen times more power in deciding whether we have a Senate focused on working for hard-working families, or a Republican Senate (that includes Ayotte) focused on pushing Donald Trump's agenda forward.**
In a race of this magnitude, Maggie needs each and every one of us with her every step of the way. What do you say, team? **[Are you in?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd938/2a380d31/16c6f266/fd14b4/2606388043/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTMwX0xPVFdfZnVsbCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160930_LOTW_full&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
-- Team Maggie

Russ asked me to send you a quick note. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4583/1c469400/dc3dff/357c679/742993205/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&utm_campaign=eoq10&utm_medium=ema") Friend, At midnight, we're closing the books on our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign, and Russ asked me to send you a quick note. **We're getting closer and closer to our $250,000 goal ... but I'm starting to worry we're going to fall short.** **[We still have to raise $22,314 by midnight tonight if we're going to reach our goal. Can you contribute $5 right now to help us get there?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4583/1c469400/dc3dff/357c679/742993205/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&utm_campaign=eoq10&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4583/1c469400/dc3dff/357c679/742993205/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&utm_campaign=eoq10&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4583/1c469400/dc3dff/357c679/742993205/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&utm_campaign=eoq10&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4583/1c469400/dc3dff/357c676/742993205/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq10_nd&utm_campaign=eoq10&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

**[We're so grateful for all you've done for Russ this cycle -- but we're counting on your help to get across the finish line. Lenee Kruse
Finance Director

name: John Gregg
subject: It's the fourth quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
We've worked too hard to let our team lose in the final minutes. Let's leave it all on the field.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6391569509207377920/3456091101923248128?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeoq_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_sepeoq_ndn_5_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Tomorrow's the start of the fourth quarter -- in more ways than one. It's literally the final quarter of the calendar year. But it sure feels to me like the end of the big game. And just like in football, everything you do leading up to the final quarter matters. We've got our book of offensive plays -- door-to-door contact, TV ads, and more -- and our rough-and-tumble line of organizers is ready. But if we don't raise the final $9,373 of our end-of-quarter goal by midnight, we could spend most of the next month stuck playing defense. **We 've worked too hard to let our team lose in the final minutes. Will you chip in your first donation of $5 or more -- before midnight? ** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6391569509207377920/3456091101923248128?utm_campaign=fnd_sepeoq_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_sepeoq_ndn_5_jg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&express_lane=true&amount=5)

John

name: Katie McGinty
subject: the gap
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Hey --

Tonight is our **_final_** FEC quarterly deadline of the campaign. I don't need to tell you this is a big deal.

We've cut the fundraising gap in HALF since I emailed you yesterday -- but right now we're still $9,129 short of our goal, and with less than 12 hours left, we're cutting it close.

[**Can you donate before the midnight deadline? With the fate of the Senate AND the next Supreme Court justice on the line, we need to give it everything we 've got >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1354130891244306432/5738737113944293376?refcode=e20160930.3&refcode2=e20160930.3nd&amount=25)

**[Please, donate now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1354130891244306432/5738737113944293376?refcode=e20160930.3&refcode2=e20160930.3nd&amount=25)**
We're about to go into the final month of this campaign, and this race is still a **_dead heat_**. There isn't an expert in the country who can predict which way it's going to end. Now, it's a simple formula: whichever side works harder and digs deeper over the next 39 days will win.

Friends, I have faith in this team, and the grassroots campaign we've built. I know we can reach our goal before midnight and win this race, but we have to give it our all.

**We 're so close -- put us over the top. Chip in before the FEC deadline at midnight:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/deadline**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1354130891244306432/5738737113944293376?refcode=e20160930.3&refcode2=e20160930.3nd&amount=25)

We're almost there,

Katie McGinty
---
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1354130891244306432/5738737113944293376?refcode=e20160930.3&refcode2=e20160930.3nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1354130891244306432/5666679519906365440).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Bullock HQ
subject: Montanans need to know the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

_"...his experience is eliminating jobs." \-- former CFO and COO of RightNow Technologies on Greg Gianforte_

**[Help us let Montanans know the truth about his record by donating $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=isF5lbzhtTum3qkIeSaRLTfaKo4TbGXb)**

Greg Gianforte's made his business experience the basis for his campaign for governor -- and has spent $1.8 million of his bank account trying to make this case.

**Montanans deserve to know that his fortune was built on helping companies outsource American jobs.** But we're currently getting massively outspent and worry that too many voters will only hear Mr. Gianforte's whitewashed version of his record. **[Donate $15 to help push back.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5jXdVCbEDsTFdBk381Y22tSItSnjbOnA)**

Thanks,

Bullock HQ
---

Dear Peter, **Time is running out. **This election will determine what direction we fundamentally turn as a nation. After 8 years of Obama, I have seen some of the worst racial and political division of my lifetime. We can't turn the clock back 8 years, but we can prevent 4-8 more years of heading in the wrong direction. **We just can't keep sending the same career politicians and expect any of this will change.** It's time to send an outsider and a fighter to the Senate. My life has been service, and when I say I'll do something I do it. [**_Time is also running out to help us meet our fundraising deadline_.**](https://u3600396.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=Ept3eUXUTOqi1x3JGzXRbXaG3KX5kcffEdOsQijnjeOxN-2BlkCfwh1j4XtHLzsigr99mTau2IgNPFkohmYOYHpmZVqoupais9AvFC12kXh94tH6MajtUQwKQFcm49Leo1VN0x2JN6drxaNGzc2EV2bdVWTeLfOOLvk51OVf2RDw0-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz0DCKsot10eGO4g1hWwNpsCOCBxq4llkdlSAzIFOJzxmAWxdNk95MXsZsDG47WRrquMKz8Ts-2BcuFvRdTlh49UPu5uEFNJSsVObgJl7TIrzOqHpy9FVfUJ4PerK2AMq6YLCrTv4nrD8qObdXN348fWOiZygPlDa9S9-2FO4I6dcVOKfqHEarvemxSPyXnyKHwV5i81r5fx0P-2BuyzTXhNRcBHmVggBbBeXM-2BdzYUPcvfrZVgHxiT7DurmFtczJVAwh07NPLFUzGLJWWcTMGkP9V1df-2BZh25n-2BLEeV8il0QfZBKgClx28iaWagSn01XMq69D1MVCNBoGWQhIawCOt0h3RR8dTFpG9PGii-2FIhlj67vPsNG84j-2FUrpcxEKdQjiKOntjL) We have less than 24 hours left. I can't express how important it is that you make your donation before the end of the day. These donations will directly determine how much I'll be able to bring my message across television and computer screens. The morning after I'll be looking to see how much we raised, and then start planning our ad buys. Now is not the time to wait if you support everything I'm fighting for. _[**URGENT: Peter, before time runs out clean_body: | | | | Dear Peter, Time is running out. This election will determine what direction we fundamentally turn as a nation. After 8 years of Obama, I have seen some of the worst racial and political division of my lifetime. We can't turn the clock back 8 years, but we can prevent 4-8 more years of heading in the wrong direction. We just can't keep sending the same career politicians and expect any of this will change. It's time to send an outsider and a fighter to the Senate. My life has been service, and when I say I'll do something I do it. We have less than 24 hours left. I can't express how important it is that you make your donation before the end of the day. These donations will directly determine how much I'll be able to bring my message across television and computer screens. The morning after I'll be looking to see how much we raised, and then start planning our ad buys. Now is not the time to wait if you support everything I'm fighting for. | Sincerely, Col. Rob Maness | | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS Friends of Colonel Rob Maness · United States

name: Katherine Van Hollen
subject: he'll keep fighting, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, I first met Chris discussing our different musical tastes, favorite movies and yes -- debating nuclear weapons policy and the nuclear freeze movement. Little did I know that 30 years later his passion to make our communities and our world a safer and better place would still be a defining theme of our lives together.

But I should have guessed, because Chris has always been a strong believer that government can be an important force for good. Sadly, we are living in a time when the radical ideology of groups like the Tea Party are undermining faith in our democracy. For the last 6 years Republican control of Congress has enabled these extremists to control the agenda and block efforts to make progress.

That's why Washington Republicans and their big-money friends are determined not to lose their majority. They're trying to turn the tide of this election in races across the country--and Maryland won't be an exception.

Over the past few months, top Republicans like Scott Walker and Carly Fiorina have been helping fund our Republican opponent's agenda. They -- just like the NRA and a shady SuperPAC that has already started attacking Chris -- know that our opponent will stand with them if she's elected.

Chris won't.

Chris has spent his time in public service fighting to keep dark money out of politics, end gun violence, and advance the issues that matter most to the people of Maryland. And when he's elected to the U.S. Senate, his opponent's big-money friends know that he'll keep fighting for our values and priorities.

Early voting begins in Maryland in less than 30 days, friend. **[Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help keep us reach our September goal before Friday's FEC deadline? ](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91add/70cdc2ba/472613e1/397af57/1596497167/VEsH/ Thank you for being part of this,

Katherine

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: No sense in sugarcoating it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Many Senate races are neck and neck -- astounding when you consider that the Koch brothers alone committed $750 million to try to keep Republicans in power.
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20160930-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend, at this very moment, millions of dollars in secret dark money that should have been spent to prop up Donald Trump are instead flowing into Senate campaigns to save the Republican majority.

Save the Republican majority - and keep blocking Democratic bills for equal pay for equal work, raising the minimum wage, refinancing student loans, or protecting and expanding Social Security. Keep working for billionaires and giant corporations, and leave everyone else behind.

**We will not -- and cannot -- allow this wave of dark money attacks to go unanswered so that Senate Republicans can have another two years to leave working families in the dirt. Not with less than 40 days to go until Election Day.**

[**That 's why I'm fighting my heart out with the DSCC for strong Democrats who can and will win back the Senate. Before tonight's deadline, will you stand with us?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20160930-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

There's good news: despite the Koch brothers and GOP mega-donors flooding the airwaves, our Democratic Senate candidates are still polling neck and neck. It's astounding when you consider that the Kochs _alone_ committed an obscene $750 million to try to keep Republicans in power.

**But our Senate candidates are running out of time to tip the balance and keep the momentum up. And they need the resources right now to finish their campaigns strong.**

From Katie McGinty in Pennsylvania to Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire to Deborah Ross in North Carolina, we can't take any race for granted. Each and every one of our tough, smart, experienced candidates needs our help -- to elect a Democratic majority and stand up for a Washington that will fight for working families, not powerful interests.

**There 's too much at stake not to jump in, Friend. Will you stand with me, the DSCC, and our Democratic Senate candidates fighting for all of us? Please pitch in before tonight's deadline:**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Greitens?=
subject: Chris Koster Should Be Ashamed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

Today, we released our newest ad exposing Chris Koster's shameful vote against women and rape victims. As a State Senator, Koster was one of only four senators to vote against a bill supporting victims of abuse. The bill was designed to stop rape victims from being forced to pay for their own "rape kit" medical exams. It helped protect victims of rape from being found by their abusers. And Chris Koster voted no.

[Watch the new ad here:](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=212ffc0f67&e=84041254e6)

[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=f4cef0db71&e=84041254e6)

When Chris Koster had the chance to stand up for Missouri women he voted NO.

-Team Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=2d65953ec4&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=4dd11d2103&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=3e95c40f88), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=8fc3e3a099&e=84041254e6) with us!

body:
You saw the email about my father triple matching, right? |

Friend, The FINAL end-of-quarter FEC deadline is just HOURS away. But you still have a chance to make my father TRIPLE MATCH your contribution before 11:59 TONIGHT. Just a reminder: Contribute $35 and he’ll MATCH it. Contribute $50 and he’ll DOUBLE MATCH it. Contribute $75 and he’ll TRIPLE MATCH it. Contribute anything over $75 and he’ll TRIPLE MATCH it. Any amount $75 or over will be TRIPLED MATCHED personally by my father. That means if you contribute $100 right now, my father will add $300 from his own money into our campaign account, totaling $400 reserved for the final 39 days of our campaign. My father wants to do everything in his power to officially bring you on board. He knows that we will only win this election if every single voter who cares about this movement steps up. And he’s so committed to bringing you on that he is willing to TRIPLE MATCH donations up to $2 million if you contribute in the next 9 hours. With only 39 days until Election Day, now is the time to act. Now make your best contribution today and my father will TRIPLE MATCH it personally. Thanks, Eric Trump TRIPLE MATCH

name: Chris Koster
subject: Today’s debate and tonight’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/515508890512001024/4970145001649866752?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq3_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq3_ndn__ck)

Hello,

I just took on Eric Greitens in our first debate.

While I spoke about the importance of bringing communities from every corner of Missouri together in support of a better future for our state, Eric Greitens continued to push divisive rhetoric, putting politics over people.

As we enter the final month of this campaign, we know this race is going to get harder and the attacks will get nastier. But no matter how tough things get, I won't stop fighting for our working families.

I need your support to help carry us to Election Day. We close the books on this quarter tonight at midnight, but we still haven't met our critical fundraising goal.

[**If you haven 't made a contribution yet, will you step up today and chip in to push us over our goal?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/515508890512001024/4970145001649866752?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq3_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq3_ndn__ck)

Thank you for standing with me,

Chris

name: Barney Frank
subject: incredibly important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2de3/738133e4/3160e72b/7f854769/2993843314/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160930bf_z&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Everyone, this could not be more serious. Patrick Murphy is up against Marco Rubio for Florida's Senate seat, in one of the most competitive races in the country. If we lose, Marco Rubio gets another term. **Senate control is at stake here.**[**Contribute $10 now >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2de3/738133e4/3160e72b/7f854769/2993843314/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160930bf_z&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Patrick works hard to make our shared Democratic values a reality for all Americans. He supports working and middle class families. He knows climate change is a very real threat -- one we have to address. He'll keep advocating to strengthen Social Security and Medicare. And most importantly, he's got what it takes. I know he'll show up and work hard for the people of Florida.

We **need** him to be Florida's next Senator. It's incredibly important. Patrick can win this race, but he needs us with him now. [**Can you join me and chip in $10 to help Patrick meet his $200,000 End-of-Quarter goal before midnight tonight?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2de3/738133e4/3160e72b/7f854769/2993843314/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160930bf_z&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

The GOP knows Patrick can defeat Marco Rubio and help Democrats retake the Senate. Rubio's right wing backers are spending millions to defeat Patrick and all that we stand for. There are only **39**** days** left until the election: it's now or never. We don't want to look back and regret missing this chance. Democrats are counting on us to win this critical seat -- and this deadline is so important to the campaign.

If we win in Florida, we can retake the Senate. [**Donate $10 now to help Patrick meet his goal before the FEC End-of-Quarter deadline -- the last of this election.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2de3/738133e4/3160e72b/7f854769/2993843314/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bf?refcode=pme160930bf_z&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thank you,
Barney Frank

|
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2de3/738133e4/3160e72b/7f85476a/2993843314/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2de3/738133e4/3160e72b/7f85476b/2993843314/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

subject: Please Open
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend We wanted to make sure that you saw Bill’s email he sent to you earlier today. Our team is working very hard to make sure that West Virginians know their choices for governor on Election Day. In the lead up to November 8th, we are working to reach every potential supporter, and it probably doesn’t come as a surprise to you that running a statewide operation is expensive. **[We could really use your help.](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=1 "Donate
Today")** Please take a moment to read Bill’s email (copied below) and **[consider making a contribution to our victory fund today!](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=2 "Donate Today")** Thanks for your support, Team Cole

\---------- Forwarded message \----------
From: **Bill Cole** <info@billcoleforwv.com>
Date: Thu, Sep 29, 2016 at 1:41 PM
Subject: Is West Virginia important to you?
To: Team Cole <TeamCole@billcoleforwv.com>

Team,

In less than 40 days, voters across West Virginia will head to the polls to elect our next governor. And on November 8th, I hope to earn your vote. This is the most important election for our state in recent memory, and the choice is clear. Elect Jim Justice, and West Virginia will be under the leadership of a man with questionable business ethics and lack of transparency: **He even refuses to say who he will support for President.** In my experience, if someone isn’t willing to publicly comment on who they will be casting their ballot for, it’s a sure fire way to tell that they know their choice is wildly unpopular. In this case, it’s more than fair to say that Jim Justice is going to cast his ballot for Hillary Clinton. **This is what I'm asking:** Please stand with me as I work to grow West Virginia’s economy, and create the infrastructure necessary to ensure that **_every_** West Virginia family has the opportunity to live the American dream. **[Donate right now--->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=3 "Donate
Today")** Help me send a message to the entire state: We’re not going back to the ways of old.**[Contribute to my campaign today to help me continue to spread my message!](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=4 "Donate Today")** We have little time left to make our case, so please **[consider making a contribution today!](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=5 "Chip In Now! ")** I must be able to keep my ads on the air and reach voters all across West Virginia. **[Donate to my campaign today \---->

](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=6 "Donate Today")**I want to show Jim Justice we have the support of grassroots voters in West Virginia! **[Donate $50-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=7 "Donate Today")** **[Donate $150-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=8 "Donate Today")** **[Donate $250-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=9 "Donate Today")** **[Donate $1,000-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29_pm&n=10 "Donate Today")** For West Virginia, Bill Cole

Friends, the most critical FEC deadline of this campaign is in less than 15 hours, and right now **we're in serious danger of missing our goal.**
Everyone -- from Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ to _The Washington Post_ to _Roll Call_ -- agrees New Hampshire is one of the biggest toss-ups of the cycle, and it's very likely to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court. But after right-wing groups spent $40 MILLION in misleading ads against Governor Hassan, **the last THREE polls show Washington insider Kelly Ayotte has taken the lead.**
Your gift before tonight's make-or-break FEC deadline could be the difference between winning back a Democratic Senate and giving control of the Supreme Court over to Republicans for decades.

name: Sen. Barbara Mikulski
subject: do this with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, I first met Chris discussing our different musical tastes, favorite movies and yes -- debating nuclear weapons policy and the nuclear freeze movement. Little did I know that 30 years later his passion to make our communities and our world a safer and better place would still be a defining theme of our lives together.

But I should have guessed, because Chris has always been a strong believer that government can be an important force for good. Sadly, we are living in a time when the radical ideology of groups like the Tea Party are undermining faith in our democracy. For the last 6 years Republican control of the Congress has enabled these extremists to control the agenda and block efforts to make progress.

That's why Washington Republicans and their big-money friends are determined not to lose their majority. They're trying to turn the tide of this election in races across the country--and Maryland won't be an exception.

Over the past few months, top Republicans like Scott Walker and Carly Fiorina have been helping fund our Republican opponent's agenda. They -- just like the NRA and a shady SuperPAC that has already started attacking Chris -- know that our opponent will stand with them if she's elected.

Chris won't.

Chris has spent his time in public service fighting to keep dark money out of politics and end gun violence, and advancing the issues that matter most to the people of Maryland. And when he's elected to the U.S. Senate, his opponent's big-money friends know that he'll keep fighting for our values and priorities.

Early voting begins in Maryland in less than 30 days, friend. Will you chip in $ or whatever you can right now to help keep us reach our September goal before Friday's FEC deadline?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Donate $5 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $10 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $25 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $50 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $100 to stand with Chris >>>

Donate $200 to stand with Chris >>>

Or donate another amount to stand with Chris >>>

Polls show that 19% of the electorate in Maryland is still undecided. We need to do better than that. With less than one month until early voting we must do everything we can to turn out as many voters as we possible and move our state and our country forward.

Thank you for being part of this,

Katherine
Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
You're receiving this email at: dpwillis67@gmail.com
If you'd like to unsubscribe visit: http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe

name: Erin Wagner, RussFeingold.com
subject: You NEED to see this Tweet
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Trump went on an unhinged rant... | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c797/3120978481/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema") Friend, At 5:30 am this morning, Trump took his four-day long attack against Alicia Machado to a new low with a deeply personal attack on Twitter. He's worse than a playground bully, and he's using Twitter as a megaphone to spew his hateful, anti-women rhetoric whenever he wants. **And Wisconsin Republicans are _still_ proudly endorsing Trump. There's nothing Trump can say or do that will be enough for them to denounce him.** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c797/3120978481/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema") Team Russ has a chance to unseat one of these three -- Senator Ron Johnson -- _but we need your help to make it happen_. Tonight at midnight, we close the books on our FINAL end-of-quarter filing deadline before Election Day, and we're getting closer and closer to reaching our goal. **[Donate $5 before midnight to help Team Russ reach our $250,000 end-of-quarter filing goal.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c797/3120978481/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c794/3120978481/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c795/3120978481/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c792/3120978481/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c793/3120978481/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Senator Johnson is hitching himself to the out-of-control Trump Train in a desperate attempt to save his own political hide. But it's also not shocking that, after Trump's anti-woman rant last night, Senator Johnson is still in Trump's corner. Senator Johnson also has a horrible record on the issues that matter most to women.
Donald Trump isn't qualified to be commander-in-chief. And Senator Ron Johnson's continuing to stand by him is reckless. Thankfully, come November we can beat them both.
**[Donate $5 to Russ today to make sure Senator Johnson doesn't see another term in D.C.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c797/3120978481/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks,
Erin Wagner
Digital Content and Design Director
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c797/3120978481/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-sept?utm_source=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&refcode=ema_2016-09-30_eoq11_nd&utm_campaign=eoq11&utm_medium=ema")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c790/3120978481/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf45bd/1c469400/d8afe7/357c791/3120978481/VEsHBA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq4_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw)

Hey,

I know it's Friday night, but bear with me for a minute because this matters.

We have a major fundraising deadline tonight, but we have still have $3,600 left to raise in order to hit our goal.

And as Erika told you, last month, _**Eric Greitens raised more than two times what we did.**_ We cannot afford to let that happen again.

**[Will you chip in $25 or more right now to help us meet our goal and show Eric Greitens that our coalition of hard-working families is stronger than his out-of-state billionaire pals?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq4_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw)**

[DONATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq4_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw)

Thank you for your support, and have a great weekend,

Andrew Whalen
Campaign Manager

\---------- Begin Forwarded Message ----------

Hello,

Let me tell you what we're up against:

Our opponent has received more than $10 million from out-of-state donors. This is the most out-of-state campaign cash ever spent on a single race in Missouri. _**And last month, Eric Greitens raised more than twice as much as we did.**_

We can't let that happen again this month.

Eric Greitens is funding his campaign with massive donations from mysterious billionaires and special interest groups. We need the support of working families across the state to help us fight back.

**Our end of quarter fundraising deadline is tomorrow, but we 're still $6,800 short. [Will you chip in $25 or more today to help?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq4_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw)**

[Donate $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw_25)

[Donate $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw_10)

We can't let Eric Greitens' out-of-state billionaires buy Missouri. We need your support today to help us cut through the noise and spread our message across the state. Together, we can continue to build the coalitions we need to move Missouri forward.

[**Chip in now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7346646860435159040/-289777888142161920?utm_campaign=fnd_eoq4_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160930_fnd_gq_eoq4_ful__aw)
